name: stefanerdmann-pi-security-scanner
description: Extension for pi coding agent. Analyzes third-party pi extensions for threats including data exfiltration, arbitrary execution, filesystem abuse, network communication,  privilege escalation, obfuscation, and supply chain attacks. Uses LLM-primary analysis with structured threat categories and severity levels. Outputs scan reports with findings
